title: Purpled Netherite
description: Infuses Netherite with a purple hue.
body:
Gives all things netherite a purple tint. 

Original textures from: Hell Froze Over 
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hell-froze-over](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/hell-froze-over)
